mapper.insert: insert into t_role_menu (id, role_id, menu_id, create_time, create_by) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{menuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into t_role_menu
id,
role_id,
menu_id,
create_time,
create_by,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{menuId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_role_menu
role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
menu_id = #{menuId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, TRUE AS checked FROM t_role_menu rm LEFT JOIN t_menu m ON rm.`menu_id` = m.`id` WHERE m.id IS NOT NULL AND rm.`role_id` = #{role_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} UNION SELECT m.*, FALSE AS checked FROM t_menu m WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_role_menu rm WHERE m.`id` = rm.`menu_id` AND rm.`role_id` = #{role_id,jdbcType=INTEGER})
